creator: nobutaka@nobutaka.com
text:
At Sat, 15 Sep 2001 15:03:40 +0900,
Akinori MUSHA wrote:
> 
> What about separating the binaries & libraries part as an independent
> port?  Looks like migemo can be used without emacs20 or xemacs21-mule.

OK. I will make japanese/migemo (it installs binaries & libraries)
and change japanese/migemo-{emacs20,xemacs21-mule} to install
elisp files only.

--
MANTANI Nobutaka
